_provenance.name: Contract Review clause checklist (Legal Document Intelligence)
_provenance.description: A curated set of standard contract clauses a solo attorney checks on a commercial agreement. Each entry is a plain-English question posed to the local grounded-answer pipeline (answer() + mechanical span verifier). A clause is reported FOUND only when a span-verified, chunk-derived citation is returned (D-19/D-38); a clause the documents do not support is reported as an advisory 'potentially missing' (never a fabricated citation, never legal advice).
_provenance.informed_by: Clause CATEGORIES are informed by the CUAD (Contract Understanding Atticus Dataset) 41-label taxonomy (The Atticus Project), reviewed at /tmp/Legal-AI_Project/server/data/questions*.txt. CUAD is licensed CC BY 4.0 (https://www.atticusprojectai.org/cuad). We did NOT copy CUAD's question text: CUAD phrases every item as 'Highlight the parts (if any) of this contract related to "X"...'. The natural-language questions below are our own authored phrasing, written for an attorney locate-and-summarize workflow. Attribution is provided per CC BY; no CUAD answer spans, contracts, or annotations are included.
_provenance.boundary: Locate and summarize only. These questions ask WHAT the documents say; none asks for advice, drafting, an opinion, or a recommendation (CLAUDE.md product boundary). 'doc_types' is advisory display metadata describing where a clause typically appears; the full checklist is run regardless so an absent standard clause surfaces honestly as 'potentially missing'.

clauses.name: Parties
clauses.question: Who are the parties to this agreement, and in what capacity or entity form does each enter into it?

clauses.name: Effective Date
clauses.question: When does this agreement become effective?

clauses.name: Term & Renewal
clauses.question: What is the initial term or duration of this agreement, and how (if at all) does it renew or extend?

clauses.name: Termination
clauses.question: On what grounds, and with how much notice, may a party terminate this agreement?

clauses.name: Payment Terms
clauses.question: What are the payment terms of this agreement, including amounts, invoicing, due dates, and any late charges?

clauses.name: Audit Rights
clauses.question: Does either party have the right to audit or inspect the other party's records, books, or performance under this agreement?

clauses.name: Indemnification
clauses.question: What are each party's indemnification obligations under this agreement: who must defend, indemnify, or hold harmless whom, and against what?

clauses.name: Limitation of Liability
clauses.question: Does this agreement limit or cap either party's liability, or exclude any categories of damages?

clauses.name: Warranties & Representations
clauses.question: What representations or warranties does each party make under this agreement, and are any warranties disclaimed?

clauses.name: Insurance
clauses.question: What insurance coverage or certificate-of-insurance requirements does this agreement impose on either party?

clauses.name: Data Privacy & Security
clauses.question: What data privacy, data protection, or information-security obligations does this agreement impose?

clauses.name: Confidentiality
clauses.question: What confidentiality or non-disclosure obligations does this agreement impose, and for how long do they last?

clauses.name: Intellectual Property Ownership
clauses.question: Who owns the intellectual property, work product, or deliverables created or used under this agreement?

clauses.name: Non-Compete & Non-Solicitation
clauses.question: Does this agreement restrict a party from competing with the other party, or from soliciting the other party's customers or employees?

clauses.name: Assignment & Anti-Assignment
clauses.question: May a party assign or transfer this agreement or its rights and obligations, and is the other party's consent required?

clauses.name: Change of Control
clauses.question: Does a change of control, merger, or acquisition of a party trigger any rights, consents, or obligations under this agreement?

clauses.name: Governing Law
clauses.question: Which state's or country's law governs the interpretation and enforcement of this agreement?

clauses.name: Dispute Resolution & Venue
clauses.question: How are disputes under this agreement resolved (litigation, arbitration, or mediation), and in what venue or forum?

clauses.name: Force Majeure
clauses.question: Does this agreement excuse a party's performance for force majeure or events beyond its reasonable control?

clauses.name: Notices
clauses.question: How must formal notices under this agreement be delivered, and to whom?
